ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sieve_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sieve test */,
  "sieve_number" INTEGER /* Number of the sieve used in the test */,
  "diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the sieve in millimeters */,
  "empty_sieve_mass_gm" REAL /* Mass of the empty sieve in grams */,
  "sieve_plus_soil_mass_gm" REAL /* Mass of the sieve with soil in grams */,
  "soil_retained_gm" REAL /* Mass of soil retained on the sieve in grams */,
  "percent_retained" REAL /* Percentage of soil retained on the sieve */,
  "percent_passing" REAL /* Percentage of soil passing through the sieve */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the sieve test was conducted */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time when the sieve test was conducted */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing method used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the test */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the soil sample used in the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sieve_tests_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sieve_tests_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the soil sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sample collection */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project associated with the sample */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., clay, loam) */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil sample */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample collection location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sample collection location */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Dominant soil type in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_users" (
  "sample_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sample-user relationship */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the context of the sample (e.g., collector, tester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_users_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sieve test from which this result is derived */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Mass of soil retained) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES sieve_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sieve test associated with the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attached file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attached file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES sieve_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing method */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure of the testing method */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for the testing method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
